name: Satan & Yogirt (Helluva Boss)
description:
Well, ever sense I saw Yogirt, I just kinda assumed he was created for Satan. Ya'know kinda how that pink heart gem girl in Steven Universe was made for Pink Diamond? I kinda just thought Yogirt was made as a stress toy for Satan. So here's that! You're dating baby strawberry and you see you squeezing Yogirt, because you know? Those squeezey stress toys!

PS; if you're wondering why I have two of the same bot, it's because when I originally created this it didn't show up in the 'my characters' tab so I assumed it just went into the void and I made another one, so basically this is the original.
creator: ShadowSketchFlims
